base_url.description: Your Zendesk Support account root, e.g. https://acme.zendesk.com for subdomain 'acme'. The engine appends /api/v2 to every request; do not include /api/v2 yourself. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

access_token.description: OAuth2 access token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Preferred over api_token when both are present (matches legacy precedence).

api_token.description: Zendesk API token (Admin Center > Apps and integrations > APIs > Zendesk API). Sent via HTTP Basic as '<email>/token:<api_token>'. Requires email.

email.description: Zendesk agent email address paired with api_token for API-token Basic auth (the '<email>/token' username half).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects updated at or after this time are read on a fresh sync (no persisted cursor yet).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
